generated_oml:
// C2: Acting Components
instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Physical motor component providing output torque (τ_M) based on input current (I_M) in the MABI MAX 100 robot's first axis."
]

instance GearWheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Mechanical component transforming torque and angular velocity within the cycloidal gearbox system."
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "High-precision gearbox transforming torque (τ_G) and angular velocity (ω) between motor and output shaft."
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "CNC controller managing position, speed, and acceleration control for the robot's first axis."
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorShaftEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Primary position encoder measuring angular position on the motor shaft to reduce backlash uncertainty."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorShaftEncoderData
]

instance GearboxSecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder measuring angular position behind the gearbox for precise motion tracking."
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxEncoderData
]

instance MotorCurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor measuring input current (I_M) to the permanent magnet synchronous motor."
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorCurrentData
]

instance TorqueSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived torque measurement component calculating torque from motor constants and encoder data."
    DTDFVocab:producedData TorqueData
]

instance AngularVelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Derived angular velocity measurement component calculating velocity from encoder outputs."
    DTDFVocab:producedData AngularVelocityData
]

// C4: Physical-to-Virtual Interaction
instance MotorShaftEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorShaftEncoder
]

instance GearboxEncoderData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom GearboxSecondaryEncoder
]

instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorCurrentSensor
]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TorqueSensor
]

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom AngularVelocitySensor
]

instance OperationalEnvironmentData : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DslController
    base:desc "System configuration and environmental factors (e.g., temperature) affecting friction behavior."
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML component and connector diagrams representing the structural relationships of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance SysMLBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML behavioral models describing the dynamic interactions between motor, gearbox, and controller."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysMLModelingEnabler
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model combining Coulomb and viscous friction components for static/kinetic friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model incorporating Stribeck effect for lubrication-dependent friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model using Dahl's approach for dynamic friction characterization."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box friction model based on LuGre dynamics for advanced friction behavior prediction."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance BlackBoxFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Data-driven friction model combining measured data with analytical components for adaptive friction compensation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance SimulinkMotorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based behavioral simulation model for permanent magnet synchronous motor dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulinkGearboxModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulink-based behavioral simulation model for cycloidal gearbox torque and velocity transformation."
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured torque data (τ_M, τ_G, τ_out) from sensor inputs and derived calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance MeasuredVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time measured angular velocity data (ω) from encoder outputs and derived calculations."
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityData, GearboxEncoderData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated torque data (δτ_M, δτ_G, δτ_out) generated by friction models and simulation models."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

instance SimulatedVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated angular velocity data generated by simulation models for comparison with measured data."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]

instance FrictionModelParameters : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Updated friction model parameters derived from live data for white-box/black-box model refinement."
    DTDFVocab:fromData MeasuredTorqueData, MeasuredVelocityData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler
]

instance SystemConfigurationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Operational and environmental data (e.g., temperature, system state) contextualizing friction behavior."
    DTDFVocab:fromData OperationalEnvironmentData
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingEnabler, SimulationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML-based modeling tool for creating structural and behavioral models of the robot's first axis."
    DTDFVocab:enables StructuralModelingService, BehavioralModelingService
]

instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks Simulink environment for behavioral simulation of motor, gearbox, and friction dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]

instance FrictionModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Combination of white-box and black-box modeling approaches for friction characterization and compensation."
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical twin to digital shadow."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell framework for semantic linking of data and models."
    DTDFVocab:enables SemanticUnderstandingService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard interface for visualization of data traces and friction analysis."
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataVisualizationService
]

instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Comparison mechanism for simulated vs. measured data to validate friction models."
    DTDFVocab:enables ModelValidationService
]

// C6: Services
instance StructuralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML structural models of the robot's first axis components and their relationships."
    DTDFVocab:provides AxisStructuralInsight
]

instance BehavioralModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing SysML behavioral models describing dynamic interactions in the axis."
    DTDFVocab:provides AxisBehavioralInsight
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service combining white-box and black-box models to identify and update friction parameters in real-time."
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelUpdateAction, FrictionCompensationInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service executing Simulink-based simulations of motor, gearbox, and friction dynamics."
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulationOutputInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing dashboard visualization of live sensor data and simulation results."
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceVisualizationInsight
]

instance SemanticUnderstandingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service enabling semantic understanding of physical relationships (e.g., friction loss, elasticity) through linked models."
    DTDFVocab:provides PhysicalRelationshipInsight
]

instance ModelValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service comparing simulated and measured data to validate friction models and identify discrepancies."
    DTDFVocab:provides ModelValidationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance AxisStructuralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Structural understanding of the robot's first axis components and their interconnections."
]

instance AxisBehavioralInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Behavioral dynamics of the motor, gearbox, and controller interactions."
]

instance FrictionModelUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic update of friction model parameters based on live data analysis."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance FrictionCompensationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into friction compensation strategies for improving robot motion accuracy."
]

instance SimulationOutputInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Simulated torque and velocity outputs for comparison with measured data."
]

instance DataTraceVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Visualized data traces showing measured vs. simulated friction behavior over time."
]

instance PhysicalRelationshipInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Semantic understanding of physical relationships like friction loss and elasticity in the system."
]

instance ModelValidationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Validation results comparing simulated and measured data to assess model accuracy."
]

instance PredictiveMaintenanceInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Early detection of wear or anomalies in gearbox or motor components based on friction analysis."
]

instance ControlAlgorithmRefinementAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Refinement of control algorithms to compensate for friction and improve motion accuracy."
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The digital shadow does not directly push data back to the physical system (as it is a **digital shadow**, not a digital twin). However, insights from the DS (e.g., friction model improvements) can be used to **update control algorithms** or **recalibrate the robot** indirectly. The DS provides a foundation for future digital twin implementations that may include active feedback."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital shadow operates in **real-time** (live data streaming via MQTT) and supports **continuous, dynamic updates** to friction models during operation. The time scale for synchronization is **sub-second** (aligned with sensor sampling rates and control loop frequencies)."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital shadow constellation consists of:
  - **Physical system**: MABI MAX 100 robot (first axis).
  - **Digital shadow components**: Data traces, models (engineering/simulation), processing logic, and visualization dashboard.
  - **Data flow**: One-way from PT → DS (no active feedback to PT).
  - **Orchestration**: Centralized processing with modular components (e.g., friction models, simulation modules)."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital shadow covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical system, focusing on **real-time monitoring and adaptive modeling** during operation. It does not explicitly model the **as-designed** or **as-manufactured** phases but uses manufacturer-provided parameters (e.g., motor constants) for initial calibration."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Linking data traces to their sources (sensors, models, processing components).
  - **Model validation**: Comparing simulated outputs (ˆ*r_M*, ˆ*r_G*, ˆ*r_out*) with measured data (*r_M*, *r_G*, *r_out*).
  - **Uncertainty quantification**: Analyzing deviations between simulated and real data to identify friction effects.
  - **Verification**: Using manufacturer-provided parameters (e.g., motor constants) for initial calibration."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Technical connections include:
  - **Data transmission**: MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data.
  - **Network architecture**: Centralized DS server receiving data from the robot’s CNC controller (Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl).
  - **Data format**: Time-series data (torque, angular velocity, current) with metadata for traceability."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital shadow is hosted on a **local server** (likely co-located with the robot or in the factory network) for low-latency processing. Deployment involves:
  - **Simulink models** running on a simulation environment (e.g., MATLAB).
  - **Dashboard** for visualization (web-based or local application).
  - **MQTT broker** for data streaming."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not explicitly addressed in the document. The DS focuses on the first axis and does not describe integration with external systems (e.g., ERP, MES, or other DTs)."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not explicitly addressed. Assumed to follow standard industrial data governance policies, with data owned by the **robot manufacturer (MABI Robotic AG)** or **factory operator**, and access controlled via the DS infrastructure."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Standards and methodologies used include:
  - **SysML** for modeling (structural/behavioral diagrams).
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for semantic data linking.
  - **MQTT** for real-time data streaming.
  - **Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE)** for system description.
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for conceptual framework."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Not explicitly detailed. Assumptions:
  - **Data security**: MQTT and local hosting may use encryption (not specified).
  - **Safety**: No direct remote operations on the PT; DS is passive (no active feedback). Future DT implementations may require safety protocols (e.g., ISO 10218 for robot safety)."
]
